text:
105 PRs merged this week. We finally shipped persistent media storage (Cloudflare R2) so your generated files actually stay put. The app showcase got a massive reorg with automated health checks—if an app breaks, it gets removed. Plus: the text service was rewritten in Hono/TS, and we wired up Claude 3.7 Sonnet, Gemini 3.1, and Grok-imagine. 50+ new community apps added to the ecosystem. The garden is growing. 🌱 Link in bio to build something.

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #buildinpublic #webdev #aiapi #typescript
